title: Detection Control
description: Inspect live updates and control the detection session.
selectPortsRequired: Select receive and send serial ports before starting detection
settingsHint: Serial port selection and language settings have moved to Settings. Saving will connect automatically and reconnect after drops.
fixedSerialHint: Serial protocol parameters are fixed in the program
sessionHint: Choose the receive and send ports in Settings. The system will connect automatically and reconnect after drops. Live updates refresh the lists automatically.
summaryHint: Parsed output keeps the raw serial line alongside the structured payload.
